title: Is creative insight task-specific? A coordinate-based meta-analysis of neuroimaging studies on insightful problem solving.

assets.abstract: The question of whether creative insight varies across problem types has recently come to the forefront of studies of creative cognition. In the present study, to address the nature of creative insight, the coordinate-based activation likelihood estimation (ALE) technique was utilized to individually conduct three quantitative meta-analyses of neuroimaging experiments that used the compound remote associate (CRA) task, the prototype heuristic (PH) task and the Chinese character chunk decompositi

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Bridge paper score=13.0: links Knowledge/Gnosis concept to mechanistic neuroscience
